scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,cyan "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.dev:mock: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,cyan "npm run mock --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.start:mock: cross-env USE_MOCK=true npm run start --prefix server
scripts.install:all: npm install && npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client
